message:
🐛 fix: warn when using default feedback/rewards repo targets (#2844)

Add startup log warnings when FEEDBACK_REPO_OWNER, FEEDBACK_REPO_NAME,
or REWARDS_GITHUB_ORGS env vars are not set, so fork and enterprise
deployers know to configure them instead of silently routing user
feedback and rewards to the upstream kubestellar repositories.

Fixes #2826

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
